activate_link__subtitle: Your link stays inactive until a plan is purchased. Choose one to publish it for your guests.
activate_link__price_approximate_note: Price approximate. Final amount confirmed at checkout.
activate_link__error_default: Couldn't start checkout. Please try again.
activate_link__empty_plans: No plans are available right now. Please try again in a moment.
activate_link__banner__title: Activate your link to start collecting messages
activate_link__banner__body: Your QR code works only after you choose a plan.
link_toggle__body_on: Your QR code accepts new submissions. Pause to stop accepting messages.
link_toggle__body_off: Your link is paused. Activate to start accepting messages again.
link_settings__subtitle: Control what guests can submit through your link, QR code, and kiosk.
link_settings__empty__body: Create an event to manage link settings.
link_settings__types__desc: Choose which formats guests can send.
link_settings__gallery__desc: Share a view-only gallery of all event photos and videos with your guests.
link_settings__gallery__toggle_desc: Anyone with the link can view the gallery. Guests cannot upload or comment.
link_settings__gallery__regenerate_hint: Regenerating creates a new link and disables the old one.
